meta.title: 天人合一与生态哲学
meta.description: Native-level philosophical discourse on the unity of heaven and humanity in Chinese: idioms, classical concepts, formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 원어민 수준의 천인합일·생태 철학 담화: 성어, 고전 개념, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「天人合一」is a classical Chinese philosophical concept meaning "the unity of heaven (nature) and humanity", advocating harmony between people and nature.
explanation.ko: 「天人合一」는 하늘(자연)과 인간이 하나라는 고전 중국 철학 개념으로, 인간과 자연의 조화를 주장한다.

questions.prompt: 「天人合一」是什么意思？(What does 天人合一 mean?)
choices: 天人合一(the unity of heaven and humanity — a holistic philosophy of harmony between nature and humans)

explanation.en: 「顺应自然」means "to follow natural laws and live in harmony with nature".
explanation.ko: 「顺应自然」는 자연의 법칙을 따르며 조화롭게 산다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「顺应自然」是什么意思？(What does 顺应自然 mean?)
choices: 遵循自然规律，与自然和谐相处(following natural laws, living in harmony with nature)

explanation.en: 「万物有灵」(animism) is the belief that all things in the world possess some form of spirit or life force.
explanation.ko: 「万物有灵」는 세상 만물이 영성이나 생명력을 지닌다는 애니미즘적 믿음을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「万物有灵」是什么意思？(What does 万物有灵 mean?)
choices: 认为世间万物皆具有某种灵性或生命力(the belief that everything in the world possesses some form of spirit or vitality)

explanation.en: 「涸泽而渔」(similar to 竭泽而渔) is an idiom for exhausting resources unsustainably for short-term gain.
explanation.ko: 「涸泽而渔」(竭泽而渔와 유사)는 단기 이익을 위해 자원을 무분별하게 고갈시키는 것을 뜻하는 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「涸泽而渔」是什么意思？(What does 涸泽而渔 mean, and how does it relate to ecology?)
choices: 为了短期利益而彻底破坏资源的可持续性(destroying the sustainability of resources for short-term gain — similar to 竭泽而渔)

explanation.en: 「敬天爱人」means "an attitude of revering nature and caring for others".
explanation.ko: 「敬天爱人」는 자연을 경외하고 타인을 사랑하는 태도를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「敬天爱人」是什么意思？(What does 敬天爱人 mean?)
choices: 敬畏自然、关爱他人的处世态度(an attitude of reverence for nature and love for others)
蔑视自然，只关心自身利益
孤立自我，不顾他人与自然

explanation.en: 「天人合一」means "the unity of heaven and humanity".
explanation.ko: 「天人合一」는 '천인합일'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 中国古代哲学中___的思想，强调人类应当与自然融为一体，而非凌驾其上。(The classical Chinese philosophical concept of the unity of heaven and humanity emphasizes that humans should merge with nature, rather than dominate it.)

explanation.en: 「顺应自然」means "to follow natural laws".
explanation.ko: 「顺应自然」는 '자연에 순응하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 道家哲学提倡___，主张人应遵循自然本身的节律，而非强行干预。(Daoist philosophy advocates following nature, holding that people should follow the rhythms inherent to nature itself, rather than forcibly intervening.)

explanation.en: 「万物有灵」means "animism".
explanation.ko: 「万物有灵」는 '만물유령/애니미즘'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 许多原始信仰体系中___的观念，使得先民对山川草木都心怀敬畏。(The concept of animism in many primitive belief systems caused ancient peoples to hold reverence for mountains, rivers, plants, and trees.)

explanation.en: 「涸泽而渔」describes unsustainable resource exploitation.
explanation.ko: 「涸泽而渔」는 지속불가능한 자원 착취를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 过度捕捞与滥砍滥伐，无异于___，最终将危及子孙后代的生存根基。(Overfishing and reckless deforestation are no different from destroying resources for short-term gain, ultimately endangering the survival foundation of future generations.)

explanation.en: 「敬天爱人」means revering nature and caring for others.
explanation.ko: 「敬天爱人」는 자연을 경외하고 타인을 사랑함을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 儒家思想倡导___，认为对自然的敬畏与对他人的关爱是相辅相成的道德修养。(Confucian thought advocates reverence for nature and love for others, believing that awe for nature and care for others are complementary moral cultivations.)
choices: 敬畏自然、关爱他人的处世态度
蔑视自然，只关心自身利益
孤立自我，不顾他人与自然

explanation.en: 「暴露」means "to expose".
explanation.ko: 「暴露」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 生态危机的日益加剧___了人类重新审视自身与自然关系的紧迫性。(The increasingly severe ecological crisis exposed the urgency of humanity reexamining its relationship with nature.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味征服和索取自然资源，___不如秉持天人合一的智慧，与自然建立和谐共生的关系。(Rather than blindly conquering and extracting natural resources, it's better to uphold the wisdom of the unity of heaven and humanity, establishing a harmonious, symbiotic relationship with nature.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这项生态修复工程___投入巨大、耗时漫长，___对于恢复生态平衡而言依然是不可或缺的一步。(Even though this ecological restoration project requires enormous investment and takes a long time, it is still an indispensable step for restoring ecological balance.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 生态哲学之所以日益受到重视，___是因为人类逐渐意识到自身命运与自然环境是密不可分的整体。(The reason ecological philosophy is receiving increasing attention is precisely because humanity is gradually realizing that its own fate is an inseparable whole with the natural environment.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 生态系统一旦失去了原有的平衡，___难以在短时间内自我修复。(Once an ecosystem loses its original balance, it becomes hard to self-repair in a short period of time.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，天人合一的哲学智慧___在于提醒人类：破坏自然终将反噬自身。(In the final analysis, the philosophical wisdom of the unity of heaven and humanity still lies in reminding humanity that destroying nature will ultimately backfire on itself.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，古老的生态智慧与现代科学的洞见___为解决当代环境危机提供了宝贵的思路。(From this we can see that both ancient ecological wisdom and modern scientific insight jointly provide valuable approaches to solving contemporary environmental crises.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，破坏生态平衡的行为___会引发一系列难以预料的连锁反应。(As everyone knows, actions that disrupt ecological balance often trigger a series of unpredictable chain reactions.)

explanation.en: 「岂仅是〜」is a classical-style rhetorical construction.
explanation.ko: 「岂仅是〜」는 고전적 반어 구문이다.

questions.prompt: 天人合一之道，岂___空泛的哲学玄谈，实乃指导人类与自然和谐共处的至理。(The way of the unity of heaven and humanity is by no means merely empty philosophical rhetoric, but truly the ultimate principle guiding humanity to live in harmony with nature.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 尊重自然规律的智慧___蕴藏在古老的农耕文化与节气传统之中。(The wisdom of respecting natural laws is often embedded in ancient agricultural culture and seasonal traditions.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 秉持天人合一的智慧: 不如秉持 (not 秉持不如).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '秉持天人合一的智慧' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如秉持'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味征服和索取自然资源，秉持不如天人合一的智慧，与自然建立和谐共生的关系。(Rather than blindly conquering and extracting natural resources, it's better to uphold the wisdom of the unity of heaven and humanity, establishing a harmonious, symbiotic relationship with nature.) — find the error
choices: 与其一味征服和索取自然资源，不如秉持天人合一的智慧，与自然建立和谐共生的关系。
与其一味征服和索取自然资源，秉持不如天人合一的智慧，与自然建立和谐共生的关系。
与其一味征服和索取自然资源，不如天人合一秉持的智慧，与自然建立和谐共生的关系。
与其一味征服和索取自然资源，秉持天人合一不如的智慧，与自然建立和谐共生的关系。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 生态哲学之所以日益受到重视，因为是人类逐渐意识到自身命运与自然环境是密不可分的整体。(The reason ecological philosophy is receiving increasing attention is precisely because humanity is gradually realizing that its own fate is an inseparable whole with the natural environment.) — find the error
choices: 生态哲学之所以日益受到重视，是因为人类逐渐意识到自身命运与自然环境是密不可分的整体。
生态哲学之所以日益受到重视，因为是人类逐渐意识到自身命运与自然环境是密不可分的整体。
生态哲学之所以日益受到重视，是人类因为逐渐意识到自身命运与自然环境是密不可分的整体。
生态哲学之所以日益受到重视，人类是因为逐渐意识到自身命运与自然环境是密不可分的整体。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 生态系统一旦失去了原有的平衡，难以才在短时间内自我修复。(Once an ecosystem loses its original balance, it becomes hard to self-repair in a short period of time.) — find the error
choices: 生态系统一旦失去了原有的平衡，就难以在短时间内自我修复。
生态系统一旦失去了原有的平衡，难以才在短时间内自我修复。
生态系统一旦失去了原有的平衡，才难以在短时间内自我修复。
生态系统一旦失去了原有的平衡，难以在才短时间内自我修复。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其一味征服和索取自然资源，不如秉持天人合一的智慧 ("Rather than blindly conquering and extracting natural resources, it's better to uphold the wisdom of the unity of heaven and humanity").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其一味征服和索取自然资源，不如秉持天人合一的智慧' (자연 자원을 무작정 정복하고 착취하느니 차라리 천인합일의 지혜를 견지하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味征服和索取自然资源，__________天人合一的智慧。(Rather than blindly conquering and extracting natural resources, it's better to uphold the wisdom of the unity of heaven and humanity.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 生态系统一旦失去了原有的平衡，就难以在短时间内自我修复 ("Once an ecosystem loses its original balance, it becomes hard to self-repair in a short period of time").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '生态系统一旦失去了原有的平衡，就难以在短时间内自我修复' (생태계는 일단 원래의 균형을 잃으면 단시간에 스스로 회복하기 어려워진다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 生态系统一旦失去了原有的平衡，__________在短时间内自我修复。(Once an ecosystem loses its original balance, it becomes hard to self-repair in a short period of time.)
